title: Bump bundled krunkit from 1.2.1 to 1.3.1
body:
Bump bundled krunkit to 1.3.1, which comes with libkrun 1.19.3.

This version of krunkit makes HTTP parsing on the rest-uri more robust to ensure it only acts on the right request.

It also enables a new permission semantics mode in libkrun that's closer to the user expectations on macOS.

Fixes: #21402
Fixes: #29084

comments.body:
LGTM, merging.

Do we need to consider a 5.8.5 with this? I know folks not on 6 are seeing it as well

I see Paul already asked that...
Let's talk about it tomorrow, but I think a 5.8.5 next week is not a bad idea
